task: Remove the glue stick from the open drawer and put it on the countertop
raw:
Scene: glue_stick, drawer, countertop
Step 1: reach(glue_stick)
  affordance_region: the body of the glue stick
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, glue_stick, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, glue_stick) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(glue_stick)
  affordance_region: the body of the glue stick
  contact: holding(glue_stick) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(glue_stick)
Step 3: transport(glue_stick -> countertop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the white countertop
  spatial: above(glue_stick, countertop, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(glue_stick)
  done_when: above(glue_stick, countertop, 0.05)
Step 4: place(glue_stick -> countertop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the white countertop
  contact: surface_contact(glue_stick, countertop) [completion]; released(glue_stick) [completion]
  pose: stable(glue_stick) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(glue_stick, countertop) AND released(glue_stick) AND stable(glue_stick)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the glue stick
the body of the glue stick
an empty area on the white countertop
an empty area on the white countertop
steps.done_when: surface_contact(glue_stick, countertop) AND released(glue_stick) AND stable(glue_stick)
